title: Healey announces tax credit awards to build almost 700 new homes in six Mass. cities
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Governor Healey's administration announced $18.6 million in tax credits for building 662 homes in six Massachusetts cities.
Projects in Fall River, Lawrence, Lowell, Pittsfield, Taunton, and Worcester will renovate historic sites into residential units.
The Housing Development Incentive Program funded 52 projects, creating over 3,400 homes in 16 cities since 2023.

title: FBI arrests Mass. man in armed bank robberies in NH, NJ
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Joseph Sawyer, a 52-year-old from Townsend, was arrested in Albany, New York for two armed bank robberies.
Sawyer allegedly stole $6,000 from a bank in Nashua, NH, and $12,000 from a bank in Boonton, NJ.
The FBI's multi-state Operation Summer Heat 2.0 initiative led to Sawyer's arrest, involving several law enforcement agencies.

title: Motorcyclist missing since July 4 found dead in NH
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Wesley Grondin, missing since July 4, was found dead near his motorcycle on Route 2 in Shelburne, NH.
Police found Grondin after a resident searching discovered his body; he had last been seen riding a Harley-Davidson.
Preliminary investigation shows Grondin crashed into a post on Route 2; no other vehicles were involved.

title: Gov. Maura Healey declares July 11 ‘Noah Kahan Day’
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Gov. Maura Healey declared July 11 as 'Noah Kahan Day' in Massachusetts, honoring the singer's contributions and mental health advocacy.
Noah Kahan headlined four consecutive sold-out shows at Fenway Park, attracting over 150,000 fans to the historic venue.
The proclamation highlighted Kahan's connection to Massachusetts and praised his songs depicting New England's culture and experiences.

title: ‘Let’s just call it a tour’: Judy Collins says her farewell tour isn’t a farewell
author: Lauren Daley
bullets: Judy Collins' 'farewell tour' is not actually a final goodbye, says the 87-year-old singer.
Collins' 'Sweet Judy Blue Eyes' tour features shows in Cape Cod and Bar Harbor, and will be accompanied by a documentary film.
The tour runs until March 2027, just before Collins' 88th birthday, and includes performances with notable artists.

title: 3 new movies to watch on Netflix in July
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: 'A League of Their Own' (1992) with Geena Davis now available on Netflix.
'Moneyball' (2011), featuring Brad Pitt, added to Netflix's July lineup.
Ben Affleck stars in 'Gone Girl' (2014), newly available for streaming on Netflix.

title: Red Sox win 7th straight game just hours after landing in New York
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Red Sox defeat Mets 6-2, marking their seventh straight win and improving their season record to 44-48.
Sonny Gray leads Boston with six innings of dominant pitching; bullpen allows only one additional run.
Despite travel delays, Anthony Seigler and Wilyer Abreu hit two-run homers to secure the Red Sox victory.

title: Christian Gonzalez responds to report that he isn’t physical enough for Patriots
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Patriots cornerback Christian Gonzalez responded on social media to Greg Bedard's claim that he's not physical enough.
Gonzalez, regarded as a top NFL corner, criticized Bedard's report amid contract extension discussions with the Patriots.
In 2025, Gonzalez registered 69 tackles, comparing closely to Kamari Lassiter's 91, questioning the validity of the criticism.

title: Here’s who experts have the Red Sox selecting with the No. 20 pick in the 2026 MLB Draft
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: The Athletic predicts Red Sox will draft outfielder Chase Brunson from TCU with the No. 20 MLB Draft pick.
Bleacher Report suggests the Red Sox will select right-handed pitcher Taylor Rabe from Ole Miss.
Sports Illustrated projects Boston to pick outfielder Zion Rose from Louisville in the 2026 MLB Draft.

title: 5 must-watch movies & TV shows streaming right now
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: 'Little House on the Prairie' adaptation now streaming on Netflix, featuring Crosby Fitzgerald and Luke Bracey.
'The Long Walk,' a dystopian film based on Stephen King's novel, is streaming on HBO Max.
'The Five-Star Weekend,' starring Jennifer Garner, debuts on Peacock, filmed on Nantucket.
